## Meeting Purpose

[Catch up on GrowthX.ai's progress and discuss potential collaboration opportunities with WebStacks for Inbound 2023.](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai has developed sophisticated AI-powered content generation workflows and is seeing significant traction with customers](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [WebStacks is experiencing unpredictable but high lead volume, potentially due to increased LLM usage for agency searches](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [Both companies are focusing on thought leadership and high-touch client experiences over traditional marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Plans are underway for a joint event at Inbound 2023, with a tentative budget of $15-25k](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX.ai Product Development

  - [Built an AI coding agent that creates and maintains workflows in code](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Developed "Atlas" platform to manage artifacts and execution pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Created sophisticated fact-checking and deep research workflows](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Implementing inventory system to connect with CMS/sitemaps and track LLM mentions](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)

### WebStacks Business Update

  - [Experiencing highest pipeline ever in last 2-3 weeks after worst month a month ago](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Now at \~50 employees after some reduction and restructuring](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Shifted focus to include more strategy alongside design system expertise](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Finding referrals and high-touch client experiences most effective for growth](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)

### LLM Impact on Marketing

  - [LLMs taking shortcuts, favoring freshness and brand authority over quality](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [Prediction: 90% less traffic to most sites in next 2 years](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [Challenge: LLM referrals don't provide query data like search engines](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [Advice: Build topical authority, keep content fresh, monitor LLM mentions](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)

### Video Content Strategy

  - [GrowthX.ai producing high-quality video content for thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=1618.0)
  - [Offering end-to-end video production services to select clients](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [Using AI to streamline editing process and content repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
  - [Suggestion for WebStacks to create video content to enrich articles and open new channels](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=2271.0)

### Inbound 2023 Event Planning

  - [Joint event planned for September 3rd during Inbound 2023](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=2414.0)
  - [Considering options: GrowthX.ai office (50-60 people) vs. external venue (100+ people)](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=2442.0)
  - [Tentative budget: $15-25k from WebStacks](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=2569.0)
  - [Exploring creative ideas like branded transportation during the conference](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=2895.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to explore venue options and provide updates on event planning](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=2942.0)
  - [Nikan to discuss video content strategy with Jesse and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=2706.0)
  - [Both parties to finalize event details and budget in the coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=2694.0)
  - [Consider strategies for making a "big splash" at Inbound 2023](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=2888.0)
  - [Explore potential for doing two events: happy hour and exclusive dinner](https://fathom.video/share/1sTK3aYS-NUzmBxJbcAzzS4ZuPGtP-sp?tab=summary&timestamp=2836.0)
